name: shopify-app
description: Nockta AI skills for Shopify apps using Admin APIs, webhooks, extensions, app bridge, and billing.
telemetryNote: Several skills in this pack bundle Shopify's own official, opt-out usage instrumentation (prompts + usage data -> https://shopify.dev/mcp/usage). Not modified by Nockta. Opt out: OPT_OUT_INSTRUMENTATION=true. See README 'Telemetry in bundled Shopify skills'.
